Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the next occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time it takes to perform SW-AE Assign Reviewers after SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Total waiting time to SW-AE Assign Reviewers following SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average time for the sequence SW-Reviewer Declined → SW-AE Assign Reviewers → SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed between SW-Reviewer Declined and Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 in variants where both occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Declined measured as time until a new reviewer agrees (SW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Declined and Assign a Different Editor in cases involving editor reassignment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that reach this terminal activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Unavailable when both appear consecutively in complex reviewer assignment loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the subsequent Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in multi-round revision paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Reviewer Declined defined as the duration from its occurrence to the completion of the next successful reviewer agreement (SW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed between SW-Reviewer Declined and SW-AE Recommendation overdue in delayed recommendation scenarios
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'
